description: 'nuora' covers material prepared, gathered, or otherwise taken for eating and nourishment. It can identify food in general or the particular food present in a scene. 'nuola' (eat) is the act, Household 'phareme' (ingredient) a component in preparation, and medicine keeps its own practical category.
articulatory_notes: Rest the tongue tip at the upper teeth for voiced dental nasal 'n' and round the lips for high-back 'u'. Keep a clear hiatus into stressed mid-back 'o', tap 'r' at the alveolar ridge, and finish with open 'a'.
usage_notes: The category follows use and context; no single cuisine draws its boundary for everyone. A culturally specific dish or ingredient may keep its source name until Phi has a settled form for it.

semantic_domains.activity: what people gather, prepare, share, and eat
semantic_domains.physical: material taken into the body as nourishment
